short_name: Assessment of Noninvasive Neuromodulation in a Group of Traumatic Brain Injured Patients and Healthy Volunteers
title: Assessment of Noninvasive Neuromodulation in a Group of Traumatic Brain Injured Patients and Healthy Volunteers

skipped_criteria: DAI (diffuse axonal injury) diagnostic requirement: no schema field exists for specific TBI subtype diagnosis.
Consent with next of kin: consent/legal authorization status is not a patient data field in the schema.
Open TBI exclusion: no schema field distinguishes open vs. closed TBI.
History of chronic neurological conditions: prior medical history fields are not available in the schema.
